groupingMethod.problemFormulation: Assess whether simple aromatic hydrocarbon analogues can support exploratory repeated-dose toxicity read-across.

supportingProfiler.summary: Profiler evidence supports a common reactivity/mechanistic framing across the analogue set.

limitations: This object packages O-QT evidence only and is not a final suite-level conclusion.
